Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Deconstruct and Analyze the Log I need to go through each case C001 C002 C003 and list the activities Then I need to identify duplicates within each case and analyze the context

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case C001 Duplicates Verify Documents appears twice Context Analysis First Verify Documents Initial check fails incomplete leads to call Second Verify Documents Re check after customer action leads to approval

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Renaming Idea Verify Documents Initial vs Verify Documents Re verification Or Verify Documents First Pass vs Verify Documents Second Pass So Verify Documents Initial and Verify Documents After Additional Submission are good candidates

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case C002 Duplicates Call Customer appears twice Context Analysis First Call Customer Clarify discrepancy Leads to Adjust Account Second Call Customer Confirm adjustments Leads to Approve Request

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Renaming Idea Call Customer Discrepancy Clarification vs Call Customer Confirmation Or Call Customer Initial Inquiry vs Call Customer Follow up Confirmation So Call Customer Clarification and Call Customer Confirmation are precise

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case C003 Duplicates Verify Documents appears twice Call Customer appears once So in C003 Verify Documents is the duplicate Context Analysis First Verify Documents Physical verification Second Verify Documents Re verify after account adjustment

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Renaming Idea Similar to C001 Verify Documents Initial vs Verify Documents Post Adjustment The context says Re verify docs after account adjustment So Verify Documents Re verification or Verify Documents After Adjustment is good

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Cross Case Analysis Verify Documents is duplicated in C001 and C003 The core action is re verifying but the trigger is different If I name them Verify Documents Initial and Verify Documents Re verification that works for both cases

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The Additional Context supports this re checks Re verify So Verify Documents Initial and Verify Documents Re verification is a robust renaming for both

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: C003 call should be renamed Call Customer Recall Return This creates three distinct activity names for Call Customer Call Customer Clarification Call Customer Confirmation Call Customer Recall This is excellent disambiguation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The prompt asks to Identify activities that appear multiple times within the same case Initiate Request appears once per case So it does not need renaming Adjust Account is not an intra case duplicate It does not need renaming

Name: Validation - PE
Text: So I only need to rename Verify Documents in C001 C003 and Call Customer in C002

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait what about C003 Call Customer C003 has Call Customer only once So it is not a duplicate in C003 So strictly speaking I do not have to rename C003 Call Customer based on the prompt

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: If I rename Call Customer in C002 to specific names and leave C003 as Call Customer the log is still consistent within cases But renaming C003 call to Call Customer Recall makes the log better

Name: Validation - PE
Text: I think the safest interpretation is Rename the duplicates I will rename Verify Documents in C001 C003 and Call Customer in C002

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Verify Documents Initial and Verify Documents Re verification works for both For Call Customer in C002 Call Customer Clarification and Call Customer Confirmation works

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Draft the Renaming Strategy Activity Verify Documents Context 1 Initial check Context 2 Re check Rename Verify Documents Initial and Verify Documents Re verification

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Activity Call Customer Occurrences C002 first and second Context 1 clarify account discrepancy Context 2 confirm adjustments made Rename Call Customer Clarification and Call Customer Confirmation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Construct the Revised Log Map the renames to the table C001 Verify Documents becomes Verify Documents Initial and Verify Documents Re verification C002 Call Customer becomes Call Customer Clarification and Call Customer Confirmation C003 Verify Documents becomes Verify Documents Initial and Verify Documents Re verification

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Write the Justification Verify Documents The log shows two distinct phases The first is the initial intake verification The second occurs after an intervening action and is explicitly described as a re check or Re verify Call Customer In C002 the first call addresses a discrepancy leading to an adjustment The second call confirms the adjustment leading to approval

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review and Refine Check C003 Verify Documents rename This fits Re verification perfectly Check C001 Verify Documents rename Good Check C002 Call Customer rename Good Check Initiate Request Not a duplicate per case No rename needed
